title: Feathered: hard memory curation stopped at soft
body: Closed claim 0933f219-d404-4f6d-8f6e-15ec45adf028. Informational practice fitness is SOFT only, with hard 0 and critical 0. Preserved source windows in dated archives, split Starless/Open pending candidates into an active shard, and stopped at the soft boundary per owner instruction.
